The '''''Sureshot''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].

==History==
The ''Sureshot'' was owned by the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Izal Waz]] and was also a part of the [[Wild Knights]] squadron.
In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] it was destroyed over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] working for [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]] who thought the ship to be the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}
